fact_nuggets.text: Cotton Down (Japanese: Cotton Down) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Gossifleur and Eldegoss.
Signature Ability of Gossifleur And Eldegoss

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a damaging move, the Speed of all other Pokemon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Cotton Down has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a damaging move, the Speed of all other Pokemon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability.
When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
Drops everyone else's Speed when hit
